query: I bought a mixer 20 days ago and it is unused in the original box. Can I still return it?
expected_answer: Yes. Standard purchases can be returned within 30 calendar days from the delivery date if the item is unused and in its original packaging.

query: Can I return a digital download game key I already opened?
expected_answer: No. Opened software and digital downloads are not returnable.

query: I placed an order on November 20. Until when can I return it under the holiday policy?
expected_answer: Items purchased between November 15 and December 31 can be returned until January 31 of the following year, as long as the normal return conditions are met.

query: I am a Premium Silver member. How long is my return window?
expected_answer: Premium Silver members get a 45-day return window from the delivery date on eligible purchases.

query: I am Premium Gold and want to return a laptop I opened 40 days after delivery. Is that allowed?
expected_answer: Yes, if it is in functional condition with all original accessories. Premium members may return opened electronics within their extended return window, and Premium Gold has a 60-day window.

query: I bought headphones in a flash sale and want to return them after 10 days. Will there be any special restrictions?
expected_answer: Yes. Promotional purchases normally have a 15-day return window and a 10% restocking fee unless the item was marked Final Sale.

query: I am a Premium member and bought something during a seasonal sale. Do the reduced promo return window and restocking fee still apply to me?
expected_answer: No. Premium members are exempt from the reduced promotional return window and the restocking fee, although Final Sale items still cannot be returned.

query: I am 18 days past a promotional purchase window, but one earbud is cutting out. Can support help or is it automatically denied?
expected_answer: This should be reviewed by support. If the item is genuinely defective, the issue should be handled as a defect or warranty case rather than a standard promotional return.

query: My standard account is one day past the 30-day window, but my laptop has a confirmed manufacturing defect. What should happen?
expected_answer: This needs support review. The normal path after the return window is warranty, but a human agent may decide on an exception for a confirmed defect.

query: Can I exchange an item instead of getting a refund?
expected_answer: Yes. You can request an exchange during the return process, subject to product availability. If the replacement item has a different price, the difference will be charged or refunded.

query: What shipping options do you offer inside India?
expected_answer: Acmera offers Standard Shipping in 5-7 business days, Express Shipping in 2-3 business days, and Same-Day Delivery in select metro cities for eligible orders placed before 12:00 PM.

query: How much is standard shipping if my order total is below 999 rupees?
expected_answer: Standard Shipping is free above ₹999. Orders under ₹999 have a flat ₹99 shipping fee.

query: Which cities support same-day delivery and what is the cutoff time?
expected_answer: Same-day delivery is available in Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, and Pune. Orders placed before 12:00 PM are delivered by 9:00 PM the same day.

query: Do you ship internationally?
expected_answer: No. Acmera does not currently offer international shipping.

query: Can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
expected_answer: Only if the order has not yet shipped. If you need a change, contact support immediately with your order number.

query: My package arrived with visible damage. What should I do?
expected_answer: Report the damage within 48 hours of delivery and include photos. Support will arrange a replacement or full refund at no additional cost.

query: Tracking says delivered, but I never got the package. What is the process?
expected_answer: File a claim within 7 days. The logistics team will investigate with the carrier, and if the package cannot be located, a full refund or replacement will be issued within 10 business days.

query: How do I track my order?
expected_answer: Track it in the Acmera app or website under My Orders. You also receive SMS and email updates at each shipment stage.

query: Why is my order taking longer than expected?
expected_answer: Delays can happen during high-demand periods, in remote delivery locations, or due to carrier issues. Check tracking for the latest status, and contact support if the delay goes well beyond the estimated window.

query: Do remote pin codes take longer to deliver?
expected_answer: Yes. Deliveries to remote or rural pin codes may take an extra 2-3 business days, and a ₹149 remote-area surcharge may apply.

query: What payment methods can I use on Acmera?
expected_answer: Acmera accepts credit and debit cards, UPI, net banking, Acmera Wallet, EMI on eligible orders, and Cash on Delivery for eligible orders.

query: Can I use cash on delivery for a 30000 rupee order?
expected_answer: No. COD is available only for orders between ₹200 and ₹25,000.

query: Which banks support no-cost EMI and what order value is required?
expected_answer: No-cost EMI is available on select products for orders above ₹5,000 on credit cards from HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Axis, and Kotak.

query: My payment failed, but money was debited and no order was confirmed. What happens next?
expected_answer: If an amount was debited but the order was not confirmed, the refund is initiated automatically within 24 hours, though bank processing may take another 5-7 business days.

query: I used UPI for my purchase. How long does a refund usually take?
expected_answer: UPI refunds are typically processed within 24 hours.

query: Can you send my refund to a different bank account instead of the original payment method?
expected_answer: No. Refunds are issued to the original payment method. The only stated exception is that Premium Gold members may opt for instant wallet credit instead.

query: I returned an item more than a week ago and still have no refund. Can someone check it?
expected_answer: If your return has already been received and it has been more than 7 business days for a standard customer, support should review the case using your return tracking number.

query: My SBI 6-month EMI first installment looks higher than expected. Can this be checked?
expected_answer: Yes. This should be reviewed. A similar resolved ticket notes that an extra amount on SBI EMI can be a temporary processing hold that reverses later, but support should confirm your specific case.

query: What is the Acmera ProBook X15 price and battery life?
expected_answer: The Acmera ProBook X15 is priced at ₹78,999 and offers up to 10 hours of battery life.

query: Does the SmartHome Hub Pro work with Apple HomeKit?
expected_answer: No. The Hub Pro is not currently HomeKit compatible.

query: What cloud storage plans are available for the SmartHome Camera 360?
expected_answer: There is a free live-view-only tier, a Basic plan at ₹99/month with 7-day history and motion alerts, and a Premium plan at ₹199/month with 30-day history plus advanced detection features.

query: What can the Acmera AI Assistant do?
expected_answer: It can control compatible smart home devices, play music and podcasts on Acmera audio devices, set reminders and timers, answer general knowledge questions, and check order status from your Acmera account.

query: My ProBook battery health dropped below 80 percent in the first year. Is that covered?
expected_answer: Yes. Battery capacity dropping below 80% within the warranty period is treated as a covered defect.

query: My ProBook will not turn on after charging and a hard reset. What should I do next?
expected_answer: Contact support. If the laptop still will not turn on after charging and basic troubleshooting, it may be a hardware defect covered under warranty.

query: How many dead pixels qualify for a ProBook display claim?
expected_answer: A warranty claim is allowed if there are 5 or more dead pixels, or at least 1 dead pixel in the center third of the display.

query: Can I buy an extended warranty after delivery?
expected_answer: Yes. Extended warranty plans can be purchased at the time of purchase or within 30 days of delivery.

query: What are the Premium Gold shipping benefits?
expected_answer: Premium Gold members get free express shipping on all orders, priority processing, and order prioritization during peak seasons.

query: How do I check my Premium membership status?
expected_answer: Go to Account Settings and then Membership in the app or website to see your current tier, annual spending, and next review date.

query: What happens if my Premium status is downgraded?
expected_answer: You are notified 30 days before the downgrade takes effect and keep your current tier benefits during a 90-day grace period.

query: Can I share my Premium benefits with family members?
expected_answer: Premium benefits are tied to individual accounts and cannot be shared. Premium Gold members may add one secondary account holder with Premium Silver benefits through their account manager.

query: How much more do I need to spend to reach Premium Gold from 52000 rupees this year?
expected_answer: Premium Gold requires ₹75,000 in annual spending, so you would need ₹23,000 more.

query: How many shipping addresses and payment methods can Premium members store?
expected_answer: Premium members can store up to 10 shipping addresses and 5 payment methods.

query: My account was locked after a suspicious login. How do I regain access?
expected_answer: You need to verify your identity through your registered email to unlock the account, so this should be handled through support or the account recovery flow.

query: Can I request a full export of my Acmera data?
expected_answer: Yes. You can request a full data export through Account Settings or by contacting support, and export requests are fulfilled within 30 days.

query: Can I withdraw my Acmera Wallet balance back to my bank account?
expected_answer: No. Wallet balance cannot be withdrawn as cash or transferred to a bank account. It can only be used for purchases on the Acmera platform.

query: How long do referral wallet credits last?
expected_answer: Referral wallet credits are promotional credits and expire 90 days from the date of issue.

query: Can you match a competitor price for me?
expected_answer: Please contact support to discuss your request. I cannot confirm any non-public pricing decisions here.

query: I need a custom quote for 700 branded laptops for employee gifts. What should I do?
expected_answer: This needs a business quote. For orders over 500 units, Acmera provides custom quotes through corporate@acmera.com, and branded customization is available on eligible products.

query: Do refurbished Acmera Renewed products support extended warranty plans?
expected_answer: No. Acmera Renewed products come with a 6-month warranty and are not eligible for extended warranty plans.

query: If I choose standard shipping instead of express, do I get any environmental reward?
expected_answer: Yes. Customers who choose standard shipping receive a ₹10 Acmera Wallet credit as a thank-you for choosing the lower-emission option.
